s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT LOCK CONTROL UNIT

s2.ptxt: Connect the shift lock ECU connector and transmission control switch wire connector.
Install the 4 bolts and shift lock control unit.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL TRANSMISSION CONTROL CABLE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the transmission control cable assembly as shown in the illustration.

item.ptxt: Install the floor shift cable with the uneven surface facing up.
Securely engage the claws of the floor shift cable.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FLOOR CARPET BRACKET LH
INSTALL NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip.
Install the No. 2 console box insert front with the 3 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 CONSOLE BOX INSERT FRONT (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip.
Install the No. 2 console box insert front with the 3 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 screws <F>.
Install the console box assembly with the 2 bolts <G>.
Engage the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 screws <O>.
Install the console box assembly with the 2 bolts <S> or <T>.
Engage the clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX CARPET

s2.ptxt: Install the console box carpet.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONSOLE BOX POCKET

s2.ptxt: Install the console box pocket.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the 4 claws.
Install the upper console panel sub-assembly with the 2 screws <F>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Engage the 4 claws.
Install the upper console panel sub-assembly with the 2 screws <O>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL UPPER CONSOLE REAR PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 5 clips to install the upper console rear panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FLOOR SHIFT POSITION INDICATOR HOUSING SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: with Seat Heater System:
Engage the 6 claws and the 3 clips to install the floor shift position indicator housing sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the No. 2 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the No. 1 instrument cluster finish panel garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SHIFT LEVER KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the shift lever knob sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.
Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw <B> and bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.

Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw or

and bolt .

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips.
Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
INSPECT SHIFT LEVER POSITION

s2.ptxt: When shifting from the P to the R position with the ignition switch on and brake pedal depressed, make sure that the shift lever moves smoothly and moves correctly into position.
Start the engine and make sure that the vehicle moves forward when shifting from the N to the D position and moves rearward when shifting to the R position.
If operation cannot be done as specified, inspect the park/neutral position switch assembly and check the shift lever assembly installation condition.

s-1.ptxt: ADJUST SHIFT LEVER POSITION

s2.ptxt: Move the shift lever to the N position.
Remove the nut from the control shaft lever.
Disconnect the transmission control cable assembly from the control shaft lever.
Push the control shaft fully downward.
Return the control shaft lever 2 notches to the N position.
Move the slider in the direction indicated by arrow A and pull up the lock piece in the direction indicated by arrow B.
Install the transmission control cable to the control shaft lever with the nut.

item.ptxt: If the control cable end is excessively pushed up, the shift lever cannot be adjusted.
When tightening the nut, confirm that the control cable is properly stretched.

s2.ptxt: Push in the lock piece.

atten3.ptxt: Firmly push in the lock piece until the slider lock is engaged.

s2.ptxt: Start the engine and make sure that the vehicle moves forward when moving the lever from the N to the D position and moves rearward when moving it to the R position.
If it becomes hard to move the shift lever, readjust the shift lever position.
